title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Delhivery Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Delhivery Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Join the Delhivery Ventures Solutions family as a Category Manager in Ludhiana. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Delhivery Ventures Solutions:
Delhivery Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Delhivery Ventures Solutions!
